creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can't reproduce this on main.  I rebuilt and reinstalled some base system components with malloc.conf set as below, no crashes:

root@freebsd:/usr/src/lib/libc # ls -la /etc/malloc.conf
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root wheel 109 Dec  2 13:59 /etc/malloc.conf -> metadata_thp:disabled,retain:true,dss:disabled,narenas:8,background_thread:false,tcache:true,lg_tcache_max:16
